title: Config 6: adam width=384 depth=1 batch=256 aug=rotation
methodology: Generated a 1-hidden-layer MLP with width 384, batch size 256, adam at lr=0.0008, dropout=0.0, weight_decay=1e-05, augmentation=rotation, and label_smoothing=0.02.
motivation: Brief insight: ## Research Brief: Tiny MNIST Classifier (tiny-mnist). Building on exp-002-baseline-2-layer-mlp with a focused hyperparameter/architecture change.
